channel.title: TSN on My Website
channel.description: Recent content in TSN on My Website

item.title: Time-Sensitive Networking - Part 1
item.description: Time-Sensitive Networking (TSN) IEEE 802.1 is a set of standards and tools that uses Ethernet to achieve real-time deterministic communications with low latency and high reliability. The TSN technology is based on four basic key concepts, accurate time synchronization, bounded guaranteed low latency, ultra reliability and resource management.
